name: Rectangle Caribbean Acacia Wood Balcony Bar Table - Gray - Christopher Knight Home
description: This Christopher Knight Home Caribbean Acacia Wood Balcony Bar Table is the answer to the question you never thought to ask. Finally there is a compact and easy to use bar table that you can attach to your balcony for maximum space saving opportunities. You can finally enjoy you patio without having to squish a whole chat set into it. This Christopher Knight Home Caribbean Acacia Wood Balcony Bar Table, made from acacia wood, provides not only a table top but a small shelf on the bottom as well, giving you all of the hosting space you need for your balcony.
